evals.prompt: 给玄灵世界生成概念图提示词，用 Midjourney v8
evals.expected_output: Creates concept-art/ folder under worldview/xuanling/ with overview.md, locations.md, atmosphere.md, details.md. All prompts use --v 8 --raw suffix. overview.md has color palette, lighting system, atmospheric constants, style anchor, and composable keywords. locations.md has multi-angle prompts for each location found in the worldview's locations.md.
expectations: Prompts are in English even though the worldview is Chinese
overview.md includes composable keyword snippets (background, lighting, atmosphere layers)
Each location has at least wide shot, medium shot, and one variant

evals.prompt: generate world concept art for xuanling but output SDXL format prompts instead of Midjourney
evals.expected_output: Same concept-art/ structure but prompts use SDXL tag-based syntax with positive + negative prompts, quality tags like masterpiece/best quality, and no --v 8 --raw suffixes. Should include no_humans or equivalent negative tags for environment-only shots.
expectations: Prompts use comma-separated tag style (not natural language sentences)
Includes quality tags like masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed
Includes a negative prompt section or inline negatives
No --v 8 or --raw parameters in SDXL prompts
Negative prompts include people/characters exclusion tags (no_humans or similar)
overview.md composable keywords are adapted for SDXL tag format

evals.prompt: 帮末世·废土世界观生成场景提示词，这个世界比较偏二次元风格，请用 niji 7
evals.expected_output: Generates concept-art/ for moshi-feitu. Since there is no locations.md for this worldview, the skill should note insufficient location data and either extract locations from world.md/factions.md or report which files need enrichment. Prompts should use --niji 7 --raw for the anime/二次元 style request.
expectations: Uses --niji 7 --raw suffix since user requested anime/二次元 style
Handles missing locations.md gracefully — either extracts locations from other files or reports the gap
overview.md reflects anime/二次元 visual style in its style anchor
Provides feedback about missing locations.md and suggests enrichment
